content:
St. Elmo's Fire (1985)
by John Parr

[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]E/G#[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]C#[/ch]

Intro:
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] |

Verse 1:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Growing up, you don't see the writing on the wall[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Passing by, moving straight ahead, you knew it all[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]
But maybe sometime if you feel the pain[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]D/F#[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
You'll find you're all alone, everything has changed[/tab]

Verse 2:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Play the game, you know you can't quit until it's won[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Soldier on, only you can do what must be done[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]D/F#[/ch]
You know in some way you're a lot like me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]               [ch]E/G#[/ch]
You're just a prisoner and you're trying to break free[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C#[/ch]
I can see a new horizon underneath the blazing sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#[/ch]
I'll be where the eagle's flying higher and higher[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#[/ch]
Gonna be your man in motion, all I need is a pair of wheels[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]
Take me where my future's lying, St. Elmo's Fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]E/G#[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Ooo-ooo-ooo-ooh[/tab]

Verse 3:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Burning up, don't know just how far that I can go[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
Soon be home, only just a few miles down the road[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I can make it, I know I can[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]            [ch]E/G#[/ch]
You broke the boy in me, but you won't break the man[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C#[/ch]
I can see a new horizon underneath the blazing sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]C#[/ch]
I'll be where the eagle's flying higher and higher[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#[/ch]
Gonna be your man in motion, all I need is a pair of wheels[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]
Take me where my future's lying, St. Elmo's Fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                                [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]C#[/ch]
I can climb the highest mountain, cross the wildest sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]
I can feel St. Elmo's Fire burning in me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/F#[/ch]        [ch]E/G#[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Burning in me[/tab]

Bridge:
| [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] |

[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Just once in his life[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
A man has his time[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
And my time is now[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
I'm coming alive[/tab]

Chorus and Outro:
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]C#[/ch]
I can hear the music playing, I can see the banners fly[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]C#[/ch]
Feel like you're back again, and hope riding high[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]C#[/ch]

[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]
Take me where my future's lying, St. Elmo's Fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                               [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]C#[/ch]
I can climb the highest mountain, cross the wildest sea[/tab]

I can feel St. Elmo's Fire burning in me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]C#[/ch]    [ch]F#[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C#[/ch]
Burning, burning in me, I can feel it burning[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]C#[/ch]        [ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C#[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]
